Since 1996, our facility in Itzehoe, Germany has produced power MOS transistors for use in automotive, industrial, and consumer electronics and, soon, we will be opening an additional chip factory at the site for 300 mm wafer technology to help meet demand from the automotive industry. This requires us to increase our capacities and create 150 new jobs.
